LCC-HS11-L3-10001300-HSUSH-PTN-GBL-01 • HS US History & Geography: Rise of the U.S. as a World Power • The Open Door Policy

The Door Nobody Closed

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a student. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What was the teacher's lesson about?
2QUESTION 2: According to the teacher, what did Hay do when the powers gave vague replies?
3QUESTION 3: What can be concluded about why the Open Door policy held?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
